hotel_name: Khách sạn New Sun Nha Trang (New Sun Hotel Nha Trang)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Poor Customer Skills! Will never come back here!
reviews.response:
Dear Robin,
Thank you for staying with us. We appreciate your feedback and will fix the issue you have experienced. Thanks again for letting us know.
Best regards,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Very bad
reviews.text:
I won't return again
Very bad for everything 
Water wasn't show free or sell
Final checkout I must paid for 2 bottles 
No breakfast and must deposit 500k for ID deposit  ( oposit VN laws)
Room was dirty and old
Reception wasn't friendly
Only bellboy was friendly and kindly
I recommend Arron Hotel ( near here ) is cheap and very good instead this hotel
8.4 score only fake not true
reviews.response:
Dear Tuan,
We are sorry to make you unhappy during your stay. We will look into it.
Best regards,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Bad services. Receptionist not friendly
reviews.text: Room was giving not the same as advertised. No view. Totally disappointed.
reviews.response:
Dear Helen,
Thanks very much for staying with us. We took note your feedback and will look into it.
Have a beautiful day!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Not recommended
reviews.text:
I paid quite a high price for two rooms here but they turned out as a disaster which made my trip really awful! The rooms are next to an on-going construction which I don't think would end anytime soon and this construction goes on at night as well so basically we don't have a moment of rest. 

The hotel is in a small alley which made car parking or access nearly impossible. Plus, the alley is on a one way street which means if you miss this turn, you would go on for a few rounds. The rooms are so tiny that you feel so cramped and receptionist wouldn't give you a second entrance key. Hotel is filled with Chinese tourists who speak so loudly and would give a so different experience.

This is not recommended for your stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Tuan,

Thank you very much for your review. We appreciate it. However, it seems that you miss understand when staying in our hotel. Firstly, key card is only given one to our guests. If you need an extra key card, please advise it to our receptionist. We are very pleased to give you more.Secondly, you said to pay quite a high price for 2 rooms. We wonder which one is suitable price for you? After all, we agree with you that we should pay more attention to our qualify of service. Once the guests are happy, everyone will be happy.

Have a nice day!

Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Hope this hotel management can see my review
reviews.text:
To the management of the New Sun Hotel
These are suggestions for you to change before it's too late. That day I arrived at the hotel at 7:30 am and I sent luggage, the receptionist said I can check in at 13:00. By 13:00 I went back and I was tired of having early flights, meetings. I got room 1401, elevator door opened I want to break into bed when I see the door open, in the room there are about four housekeeping staff are eating lunch in my room. I'm very unhappy but I still want to double check them. This room is not mine until I give the room key to them. And by then they knew they had a problem, they said I was standing here they would go out but I did not agree and walked down the lobby. At the lobby a receptionist made an explanation and apologized to me, but actually I did not want to accept any apology from them at the time. I want to change rooms and my room is the highest room of the hotel, I think I deserve more than I expected. After about 10 'receptionist said room was ready and no room to exchange because this room is the highest room of the hotel. I agreed to go to the room because I was too tired, to the room the smell of food in the room is terrible. And there are so many things I want to tell you but come here I think enough for you to know what your hotel is like now.
Again, please make sure you change before it's too late.
reviews.response:
Dear Bao,
Thanks very much for your stay with us and review. We will pay more attention to our service. Thanks again for letting us know.
Take care!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: not good location
reviews.text: soso
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Tsun,

Thank you very much for your feedback on Agoda. We appreciate it very much.

Our hotel is in the center of Nha Trang. One of the best location. Maybe you like to stay in a remote area but it depends on guests' s hobby.

Have a nice day!

Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Cheated out of the room I paid for
reviews.text: I paid for a Triple delux with a city view and was given a horrible small room with bed bugs on the second floor with the view of the back of a ran down building and broken toilet seat. Food was cheap, coffee was second run, and staff speaks very poor English .
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms Ronnie,

Thank you very much for sharing your review on Agoda. Frankly speaking, we gave you the correct room. It is on the second floor because it is the city view. If you stay on the higher floor, we will be the sea view room with a little bit more expensive.

Hope this explanation will make you fine and we look forward to welcoming you back soon.

Have a nice day!

Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: No recommend
reviews.text: The pub nearby is too noisy at night. The staff is not helpful
reviews.response:
Dear Mei-Hui,
We all appreciate your comment and will raise it in our management briefing to better serving you in an another time.
We wish tons of best wishes for you, and really hope your next return visit would be an awesome stay.
Yours faithfully,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Not as expected
reviews.text: Overall the room cleanliness is OK, the food was so so, the view is not as expected, there was construction going on during our stay, it was so noisy all the while, not a good experience with this hotel
reviews.response:
Dear Pik,
Thanks very much for your stay with us and review. We will pay more attention to our service. Thanks again for letting us know.
Take care!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: The booking process is awful
reviews.text:
The booking process is awful, I noted on my booking that I want to early checking and lately checkout but after some days, I call them and they said that they don't manage that note, and told me that they would check if they can allow me early checking and lately checkout when I came.... but how can they work like that, when I came, how if they can't arrange, where should I stay, park or street or under brigde???

This hotel would be a good choice if they can change their booking process and fire their current booking team. such a bad memory with that hotel. will never try again.
reviews.response:
Hello Mr. Thuan,

Thank you very much for your feedback on Agoda. It seems that you misunderstand although we tried to explain to you. we told you that we do not reserve room for early check-in and late check-out during the peak season. However, we can be flexible to give you room early subject to availability. About checking-out, it is also the same. If you would like us to guarantee, you have to pay for it because we have to excuse guests and keep the room for you. Hope that you can be clear about this information. 

Have a nice day!

Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: The large room is super hot in the morning
reviews.text: The large room has huge windows, and thevAC is too weak. In the evening it is hot and in the morning it is boiling. I couldn't sleep for few days and got sick because of the sweat. The bathroom door keep on opening,  which makes the AC less effective.  Unfortunately i cant recommend the large rooms. Better take the small one without the view.
reviews.response:
Dear Elie,
Thank you for the review. We will look into it and find a solution.
Best regards,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Counter service sucks. Very rude & impatience.
reviews.text: I book 2 rooms, a deluxe double bed & a deluxe double bed & 1 single bed. So i assume the room with a deluxe double bed & 1 single bed can sleep 3 person as the hotel admin did not said its only for 2 persons. When checking in, they insist to charge me another 300,000 dong per day for the additional 1 headcount. The counter ppl are really rude & are inpatient. Communications breakdown as they doesn't seems to know what u are trying to tell them. Then they get frustrated & raise their voice. Other than that, rooms is what you paid & locations is ok.
reviews.response:
Dear Irene,
Thanks very much for staying with us. We took note your feedback and will look into it.
Have a beautiful day!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
-Original passport kept by hotel
-staff at restaurant not friendly
reviews.response:
Dear Lim,
Thanks very much for staying with us. We took note your feedback and will look into it.
Have a beautiful day!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: toilet cant be fixed
reviews.text: bad experience no good service toilet not working cant be fixed i have to use reception toilet what now?
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms Bilal,

Thank you very much for your stay and review on Agoda. We already came to see you & fixed the problem you have experienced. We appreciate your feedback and are sorry for the inconvenience that may cause during your stay.

Looking forward to seeing you again soon.

Have a nice day!

Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Very dispointed with the staff 's professional
reviews.text: To start with, we booked 2 rooms for 6 people with beach view but towels and other things have been setup for 2pp/room only and 1 room with no view (second floor blocked by other building). Then, we booked and paid for a car to airport but it hasn't been organized. On the day we checked out, we had to wait for 30 minutes for them to re-booked, lucky that we were not late for our flight. Also, we came back to hotel each day after tours, we have never checked face towels (because we never used them, only used bath towels), haven noticed that either enough for 3 people or 2. But, no toilet paper at all in one of our rooms, had to ring reception to ask for... When we checked out, they said we short ONE (01) of FACE TOWEL and forced us to pay VND50000. We paid and have the receipt but very disappointed, would not suggest to any friends
reviews.response:
Dear Hien,
We all appreciate your comment and will raise it in our management briefing to better serving you in an another time.
We wish tons of best wishes for you, and really hope your next return visit would be an awesome stay.
Yours faithfully,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Cheap
reviews.text: Price is cheap
reviews.response:
Dear Xie,
Thanks very much for ypur review. We look forward to seing you again soon.
Ho Vinh Phuong

Stay at the room with faulty aircond.

Have to stay in a hot room without window.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Hotel room is clean but the staff who serve the breakfast is poor attitude
reviews.text:
Good is hotel room is clean and room service is prompt.

Bad is the attitude of the staff who serve the breakfast is very bad. 

Frankly speaking, I will not recommend my friends
reviews.response:

Thanks very much for your stay with us and review. We will pay more attention to our service. Thanks again for letting us know.

reviews.title: BAD
reviews.text:
Communication is very bad. Staff did not understand and speak English.
No swimming pool. And breakfast not satisfy me so much.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms Helmi,

Thank you for staying with us at New Sun. We appreciate that you wrote a review on Agoda and furthermore we will do our best to change the unsatisfied things you have mentioned. Our swimming pool on the top floor is not available at the moment, and we didn't advirtise it on Agoda either. We will pay more attention to our breakfast's quality, so we are going to improve it. 
We are looking forward to seeing you soon.

Regards,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Room is small
Not good location for Seaview
Contruction around
The Best is the Breakfast, very GOOD
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Mei,

Thank you very much for your stay with us and your review on Agoda. We appreciate it. We are so happy about your compliment about breakfast and will fix the issue you have experienced.

Look forward to your next stay in New Sun Hotel Nha Trang

Have a nice day!

Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Bad Hotel
reviews.text: We went back to hotel about 30 minutes late after check-out time, they(hotel staff) got in our room, packed all of our stuffs and moved luggage down (without us being there). I was very angry, very disappointed. They shouldn't have done that without their clients' permission.
reviews.response:
Dear Hoa,
Thanks very much for staying with us. We took note your feedback and will look into it.
Have a beautiful day!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: think before you book here
reviews.text:
Pros:
•good location, Highland Coffeeshop across the street, plenty of juice shops and convenience stores around.
Cons:
•You can have boiling hot water or freezing cold water, no in between.
•Extremely noisy (from several construction sites around the hotel). Also, the noise come from the hallway, rooms next door, etc.
reviews.response:
Hello Quan,

Thank you very much for your stay with us. Yes, we are agree with you that we should look before you leap :). Our hotel is in the center of Nha Trang. That's why it is a little bit nosy and it is out of our control. In return for this, we pay more attention to our service and the comfort. Hope that we can serve you again soon.

Have a nice day!

Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Good location and delicious breakfast
reviews.text: The location is great and served delicious breakfast !
reviews.response:
Dear Yong,
Thank you very much for staying with us. See you again very soon.
Best regards,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Just a nite to rest and move on
reviews.text: Value worth but that's all. Lots of similar hotels all around Nah Trang
reviews.response:
Dear Chin,
Thank you very much for staying with us. We appreciate your feedback.

All the best,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Unprofessional staff
reviews.text:
The receptionist zone was very hot because the staff turned it off and i can see the fly was flying inside this zone, it made the hotel become a very cheap hostel. When being ask to turn the air-conditional on, the receptionist just answered that she was cold (it was 32 degree and she was cold??), I asked her to turn on for a lot of time because there was too many sweating customers in the lobby but the only thing I received was "but I'm cold" from the receptionist girl. 
She was not impolite but the way she answered made me piss off. And your hotel never turned on the air-conditional till the day i left (when checking out still not turn it on untill I yelling to turn on). May be your hotel tried to save money by saving electric but you let your lobby become very cheap and not worse to stay. 
The rooms were not ok, there were clothes of guess who stayed before me in the wardrobe.
reviews.response:
Dear Linh,
Thanks very much for staying with us. We took note your feedback and will look into it.
Have a beautiful day!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Very comfortable bed
reviews.text: We're happy with the good and comfortable bed, value for money stay and convenient location. It's in the alley next to the busy street which allow for a quiet peaceful sleep at night. The receptionist is very helpful and assisted us to book the Dat Moi limousine bus to the airport. Would come again when there's opportunity to visit Nha Trang.

reviews.title: Vị trí thuận tiện
reviews.text: Gần trung tâm dễ di chuyển.  Dịch vị ổn.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi quý khách Nam,
Cảm ơn quý khách đã ngợi khen. Khách sạn rất lấy làm cảm kích.
Trân trọng,
Hồ Vĩnh Phương

reviews.title: A steal!
reviews.text: Great boutique (33rm) hotel, comfy western bed, awesome shower, 7mins walk incl crossings to the beach. Tad noisy if you’re in a corner (intersection) unit but have another Dalat Classic wine if it’s a bother.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Worth with thr price.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: good price

reviews.title: Just the exact amount.
reviews.text: The staff is not friendly or anything like that. The location is good. I've stayed over 60 nights a year with Agoda, and this is the first time I've been asked to store my passport. I only recommend it for the low price, it deserves half a star. The refrigerator doesn't cool at all.
reviews.response:
Dear CHEOLHO,
Thank you very much for staying with us and we wish you all the best.
Have a nice day!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The price is quite cheap, and there is a bathtub, but the room is slightly small. I booked to stay here for 2 nights, but the items prepared by the hotel were not complete; some of the toothbrush boxes had no toothbrushes in them, just empty boxes, and they didn't check the completeness. However, the service was good; they carried my luggage and turned on the air conditioning for me.
reviews.response:

We appreciate your feedback and hope to see you again in the future.
All the best to you,

reviews.title: 酒店位置优越，出门200米就是海滩和广场。新年烟花表演也在这个广场。
reviews.text: 酒店位置优越，出门200米就是海滩和广场。新年烟花表演也在这个广场。酒店设施齐全，安静，前台和气。服务相当周到。非常推荐
reviews.response:
Dear 作华,
Thank you for the review. We are happy that you enjoyed staying with us.
Happy Luner New Year!

reviews.title: One of the best
reviews.text: Very nice view from the room and nothing to complain about. Best vegan restaurant was next street .beach 400m , lotus tower, coffee shop, market, night lights and panoramic window made my stay very relaxing. Deposit 500 VND or give passport at check in. Less crowded area. Good location and stuff always helpful and smiling
reviews.response:
Dear muhammet,
Thank you very much for your review. We work hard to make our guests happy and appreciate your feedback.
Have a nice day!

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.response:

Cảm ơn quý kháchị đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại New Sun Hotel. Chúng tôi rất vui khi quý khách hài lòng trong quá trình lưu trú.
Trân trọng,
Hồ Vĩnh Phương

reviews.title: 잘 머물다 갑니다
reviews.text:
혼자 머무르기엔 나쁘지 않았습니다만 
화장실에 벌레들이 좀 꼬이더라고요 ㅠㅠ 
가족/친구와 오는 거라면 4/5성급으로 가시는 걸 추천합니다
청소도 제대로 해주시는 건지 잘 모르겠어요 
체크인/아웃이 24시간인 점은 마음에 들었습니다. 직원분들도 친절했습니다.
reviews.response:
Dear 성은,
Thank you very much for staying with us. We will work hard to fix the issues you have experienced and appreciate your feedback.
Have a nice day!
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Regular patron
reviews.text: Been coming here since 2019.  I started coming here right before the pandemic.  Its in a nice spot close to many things I need to be close to.   I go to a couple of gyms about a mile away.  I also like how I can get to Ocean in less than 3 minutes.
reviews.response:
Dear Hao,
Warm greetings from New Sun Hotel.
We appreciate you regarding the review and wish you all the best.
See you again soon,
Ho  Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: It's okay to stay for a day since I arrive late at night.
reviews.text: It is worth visiting for a budget of 0.5 nights, and the bedding was clean. The room condition cannot be compared to higher star-rated hotels, but I believe it is a sufficiently reasonable choice among hotels in the same price range. The staff are also very friendly. For reference, they hold on to your passport as a deposit and return it when you check out the next day.
reviews.response:
Dear seung,
We thank you very much for choosing New Sun Hotel and wish you all the best.
Best regards,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.response:

Mong sớm được gặp lại quý khách.
Trân trọng,
Hồ Vĩnh phương

reviews.title: worth the money
reviews.text: The reception girl is helpful, and the room is bigger than I expected with nice windows. The bathroom is nice too, with enough room for me to put everything. The only thing I would say is that the TV has no signal.
reviews.response:

Thank you for staying with us. We appreciate your feedback very much and wish you all the best.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is at the end of the alley, getting a car in can be a bit tricky, but it's convenient to walk to the beach and nearby entertainment spots near the Trầm Hương Tower. The staff is lovely and friendly, the rooms are clean, and the prices are affordable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The air-conditioned room is very dusty, pulling the curtains causes dust to fly everywhere, the TV is about to fall to the ground, and the coffee kettle placed right by the curtain is very inconvenient.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The security guards here are super enthusiastic and cute. The room is spacious, clean, and worth the price, located right in the center, making it very convenient for getting around.
reviews.response:

Cảm ơn quý khách chia sẽ trải nghiệm trong quá trình lưu trú. Mong sớm được gặp lại quý khách.

reviews.title: That's fine too.

Hồ Vĩnh Phương

reviews.title: The best value-for-money hotel.
reviews.text: The hotel is affordable and has an excellent location. You can reach the city and the beach within a 10-minute walk. I highly recommend this hotel for those who plan to stay for half a night or just need a place to sleep while engaging in a lot of outdoor activities, as it offers great value for money. The hotel was clean, and the bedding was also clean. The staff were friendly as well.
reviews.response:
Dear KIMSANGMI,
Thank you very much for staying with us. We are so glad to read your review.
All the best,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: The hotel is decent for the price.
reviews.text:
Pros: The security guards are very friendly, and the reception staff are average. The hotel is centrally located, with many amenities within a 400m radius, close to the beach. The room size is decent, not too big or too small. Worth the price range.
Cons: Our family stayed in 2 rooms, both had issues with the air conditioning, one room was not cool, the other room was slightly cool.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi quý khách Minh,
Cảm ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn New Sun Hotel Nha Trang là nơi lưu trú. Khách sạn xin ghi nhận những ý kiến đóng gop của quý khách và sẽ tìm khách khắc phục sửa chữa.
Trân trọng,
Hồ Vĩnh Phương

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The location is very convenient, just a short walk to the night market where you can find a lot of food, and it's also close to the beach, about a 5-minute walk. The rooms are clean and the staff are lovely; I will return to this hotel when I come back here.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi quý khách Phụng,
Cảm ơn quý khách với những lời ngợi khen. Khách sạn rất lấy làm cảm kích.

reviews.text: If you're looking for an affordable, clean, and centrally located, this is the place for you. Look no further! The bed is fresh and clean, the bathroom clean with all the amenities you need, and it's quiet with no karaoke or roosters screaming. Sure you can find places that are fancier but you're also paying $30 plus. I paid less then a third of that price. You get clean, quiet, and centrally located location.

reviews.title: One of my favorite hotels
reviews.text:
I love this hotel right in heart of Nha Trang City. It’s very affordable for all travelers. The room 902 is very clean, modern, fantastic bathroom, nice city room view, and staffs are very friendly.   
There are couple minor things such as the room is a bit small size, found bunch of ants in this room, the floor right next to the small refridge is damaged. The hotel responsed very with issues such as not enough water flow for shower, the light didn’t work. 
Overall, it’s a wonderful place to stay at this a beautiful Nha Trang.

reviews.title: Good value and location, no hand soap?
reviews.text:
All the positive reviews about the cleanliness and good location are accurate, but I'll add a few complaints:

- It's strange to have no hand soap, only body wash in small bottles. Staff won't provide it if asked either.
- The bed is just ok. I could feel the springs.
- Housekeeping might wake you up early in the morning and frequently occupy the sole tiny elevator, holding it at certain floors so you have to wait for them or walk down.
- The TV's picture quality is so bad there's no point turning it on.
-The bathroom is just walled off by glass, not great for friends or couples who value privacy.

It's still very good for the price, just expect a budget experience.
reviews.response:
Dear Derek,
Thank you for choosing New Sun Hotel Nha Trang. We will work hard to fix the issues you have experienced. Thanks again for letting us know.
Best regards,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: Paradise in Vietnam!
reviews.text:
I cannot erase the happiness and regret I feel from my fantastic 2-night, 3-day stay at Mövenpick. I couldn't take my eyes off the beautiful resort and the harmonious scenery of the ocean view and beach that was right in front of me.

As for breakfast, there were additional guests, but there were no extra charges or confirmations, as it was free according to the policy.

Additionally, the complimentary services for children were really great.

The various pools at the resort are fantastic, but the beautiful beach is so stunning that words cannot express it. The sand and sea were immaculate, and the clarity was unimaginable in Korea, making it hard for me to leave the water.

Furthermore, the buggy pick-up service provided in the spacious resort reduces energy expenditure, allowing for more enjoyment elsewhere!

I sincerely recommend it, and it will be a vacation you won’t regret.
reviews.response:
Dear Chulhyuck,
Thank you for choosing Viet Nam for your destination.
All the best,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: A hotel with good cost performance.
reviews.text: It is a 3-star hotel located in a private area that is close to the beach and the city center of Nha Trang, making it a good location for visiting the city and attractions. The twin bedroom is a suitable size for about 2 people and comes with 2 bottles of water, towels, shampoo, shower gel, and a toothbrush. The downside is that the refrigerator has weak cooling, and although it has up to the 14th floor, there is no swimming pool. However, it fits well with the affordable price, and I was satisfied.
reviews.response:
Dear Koo,
Thank you very much for your feedback. We took note and fix the problem you experienced. Thanks for letting us know.
Best regards,
Ho Vinh Phuong

reviews.title: A good hotel at a budget price, clean and close to the center.
reviews.text: This hotel is very worth the money with the promotional price of 285k for a room for 3 people. It's very clean and tidy, although a bit small, but fully equipped. The bathroom is clean and has no damp smell. For anyone going to Nha Trang, if you just need a room to sleep through the night without needing a view, this hotel is quite alright and is close to the center. As for parking, I will park at the end of the alley, as the hotel is on a one-way street, so you have to go around when coming back (most of the streets near Tran Phu center are one-way, so this is not an issue).
reviews.response:
Kính gửi quý khách Mai,
Cảm ơn về những nhận xét quý báu của quý khách. Khách sạn mong chờ được đón tiếp quý khách vào dịp gần nhất.
Trân trọng,
Hồ Vĩnh Phương
